What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

provide an equal opportunity for all children to play organized hockey, Required Medical Form, Select, Travel, Summer Series, and Spring Camps, 8U, 10U, 12U, 14U, HS

Season ops snapshot Registration + roster board Family record Registration + volunteer view Season calendar + evaluation window Season closeout + re-enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One row per skater — age division, Select or Travel, registration, medical form, jersey size
  • Volunteer slots surface next to the roster instead of living in a separate coordinator's inbox
  • Re-enrollment view ready when Summer Series and Spring Camps open so the registrar stops starting from scratch

Season ops snapshot

2. Registration + roster board

Registration + roster board

3. Family record

Family record

One record per family with every skater, division, Select vs Travel tier, registration fee, Required Medical Form status, jersey size, and volunteer claims.

Registration + volunteer view

Focus view pairing each family's three-step registration progress with claimed volunteer slots for upcoming BHL and MCHL weekends.

Season calendar + evaluation window

After March the board becomes a re-enrollment list: age-up tags, Select→Travel candidates, Spring Camps / Summer Series email list, and outstanding-balance flags.
